mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, email, password, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, refresh_token FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, email, password, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, refresh_token FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, email, password, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, refresh_token FROM users WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND deleted_at IS NULL
